nasb.text: But being full of the Holy Spirit, he gazed intently into heaven and saw the glory of God, and Jesus standing at the right hand of God;

esv.text: But he, full of the Holy Spirit, gazed into heaven and saw the glory of God, and Jesus standing at the right hand of God.

cnv.text: 但司提反被聖靈充滿，定睛望著天，看見　神的榮耀，並且看見耶穌站在　神的右邊，

ccb.text: 司提凡却被圣灵充满，定睛望天，看见上帝的荣耀和站在上帝右边的耶稣。

csbs.text: 但是司提反充满圣灵，注目望天，看见了神的荣耀，又看见耶稣站在神的右边。
